name: Agent Tool Access Security Policy
platform: Microsoft Entra ID + Azure API Management

controls.title: Token-based access control
controls.requirement: All tool calls require Entra-issued JWT tokens validated by APIM.
controls.entra_capability: App registrations, OAuth2 scopes, managed identity

controls.title: Least-privilege role assignments
controls.requirement: Each workload identity receives only the minimum role per component.
controls.entra_capability: RBAC role assignment + workload identity separation

controls.title: Deterministic policy boundary
controls.requirement: APIM policy enforces scope checks, rate limits, and request logging for tool invocations.
